mnemonics: PANdas DAta iS grEAT: PANdas for DAta manipulation and analysis is grEAT. (PAN-DA-S)
keyPoints: The primary data structures are Series (1D) and DataFrame (2D)
pandas provides powerful tools for data cleaning, transformation, and aggregation
It integrates seamlessly with other data science libraries like NumPy and Matplotlib
commonMistakes: Using Python in-place operations instead of pandas methods (e.g., 'df = df + 1' instead of 'df.add(1)')
Forgetting to use .copy() when creating a new DataFrame from a slice to avoid the SettingWithCopyWarning
Not handling missing data explicitly (NaN values) leading to errors in calculations
